    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="en">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>DR Database — Destiny Recruit Consults</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@tabler/icons-webfont@latest/dist/tabler-icons.min.css">
    <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    :root {
    --gold: #F5C453;
    --gold-dark: #C9A227;
    --gold-deeper: #A8841C;
    --gold-light: #FDF6E2;
    --gold-lighter: #FEFCF4;
    --charcoal: #2A2A28;
    --charcoal-2: #1E1D1B;
    --green: #1D9E75;
    --green-dark: #0F6E56;
    --green-light: #E1F5EE;
    --amber: #BA7517;
    --amber-light: #FAEEDA;
    --blue: #185FA5;
    --blue-light: #E6F1FB;
    --red: #A32D2D;
    --red-light: #FCEBEB;
    --purple-light: #EEEDFE;
    --purple: #3C3489;
    --pink-light: #FBEAF0;
    --pink: #993556;
    --slate: #3D3B52;
    --gray-light: #F1EFE8;
    --gray: #5F5E5A;
    --bg: #ECEAE3;
    --surface: #F9F8F3;
    --surface-2: #FFFFFF;
    --border: #E5E1D8;
    --border-2: #D4CEBF;
    --text: #2A2A28;
    --text-2: #5A5955;
    --text-3: #9A9891;
    --radius: 10px;
    --radius-lg: 14px;
    --radius-pill: 30px;
    --shadow-sm: 0 1px 4px rgba(42,42,40,.06);
    --shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(42,42,40,.08);
    --shadow-lg: 0 12px 40px rgba(42,42,40,.12);
    --sidebar-w: 64px;
    }
    body {
    font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.5;
    min-height: 100vh;
    overflow: hidden;
    }
    /* ── LOADING ── */
    .loading-overlay { display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(255,255,255,.85); z-index:999; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-direction:column; gap:12px; font-size:13px; color:var(--text-2); }
    .loading-overlay.show { display:flex; }
    .spinner { width:30px; height:30px; border:3px solid var(--border); border-top-color:var(--gold); border-radius:50%; animation:spin .7s linear infinite; }
    @keyframes spin { to { transform:rotate(360deg); } }
    /* ── LOGIN ── */
    #login-screen { min-height:100vh; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:20px; background:#E2E1DC; overflow:auto; }
    .lp-window { background:linear-gradient(145deg,#F9F8F3 0%,#F1EFE6 100%); width:100%; max-width:1100px; height:720px; border-radius:24px; box-shadow:0 30px 70px rgba(0,0,0,.12); display:flex; overflow:hidden; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.6); }
    .lp-form-panel { flex:1.1; padding:50px 65px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:space-between; }
    .lp-brand-tag { align-self:flex-start; background:#fff; border:1px solid #E6E4DD; border-radius:30px; padding:8px 20px; font-size:13px; font-weight:600; color:var(--charcoal); box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.02); }
    .lp-content-area { max-width:360px; width:100%; margin:0 auto; }
    .lp-header { margin-bottom:32px; text-align:center; }
    .lp-header h1 { font-size:28px; font-weight:700; color:var(--charcoal); letter-spacing:-.02em; margin-bottom:6px; }
    .lp-header p { font-size:14px; color:#7A7A77; font-weight:500; }
    .lp-input-group { margin-bottom:18px; text-align:left; }
    .lp-input-group label { display:block; font-size:12px; font-weight:600; color:#7A7A77; margin-left:16px; margin-bottom:6px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.03em; }
    .lp-input-wrap { position:relative; display:flex; align-items:center; }
    .lp-input-wrap input { width:100%; height:48px; background:#fff; border:1px solid #E6E4DD; border-radius:30px; padding:0 22px; font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:500; color:var(--charcoal); transition:all .25s; }
    .lp-input-wrap input:focus { outline:none; border-color:#D2C0A5; box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(245,196,83,.15); }
    .lp-pw-toggle { position:absolute; right:18px; background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; color:#7A7A77; }
    .lp-pw-toggle i { font-size:17px; }
    .lp-forgot { display:block; text-align:right; font-size:12px; color:#7A7A77; margin-top:6px; margin-right:14px; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; }
    .lp-forgot:hover { color:var(--charcoal); text-decoration:underline; }
    .lp-submit { width:100%; height:48px; background:var(--gold); color:var(--charcoal); border:none; border-radius:30px; font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer; margin-top:12px; box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(245,196,83,.25); transition:all .2s; }
    .lp-submit:hover { background:#E4B33E; transform:translateY(-1px); }
    .lp-chips { display:flex; gap:12px; margin-top:16px; }
    .lp-chip { flex:1; height:42px; background:#fff; border:1px solid #E6E4DD; border-radius:30px; font-size:12px; font-weight:600; color:var(--charcoal); display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; }
    .lp-chip i { font-size:15px; color:var(--gold-dark); }
    .lp-footer { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-size:12px; color:#7A7A77; font-weight:500; }
    .lp-footer a { color:#7A7A77; text-decoration:none; font-weight:600; }
    .lp-footer a:hover { color:var(--charcoal); text-decoration:underline; }
    .lp-alert { background:var(--red-light); border:1px solid #EFA3A3; color:var(--red); padding:10px 16px; border-radius:30px; font-size:12px; font-weight:500; text-align:center; margin-top:14px; display:none; }
    .lp-media { flex:1.1; margin:14px; border-radius:20px; background-size:cover; background-position:center; position:relative; overflow:hidden; background-image:url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1573497019940-1c28c88b4f3e?auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80'); }
    .lp-media-overlay { position:absolute; inset:0; background:linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(30,30,28,.2) 0%,rgba(30,30,28,.55) 100%); }
    .lp-widget-task { position:absolute; top:35px; left:35px; background:var(--gold); padding:12px 18px; border-radius:14px; max-width:190px; z-index:2; }
    .lp-widget-task h4 { font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:var(--charcoal); margin-bottom:2px; }
    .lp-widget-task p { font-size:10px; font-weight:500; color:rgba(0,0,0,.6); }
    .lp-bottom { position:absolute; bottom:35px; left:35px; right:35px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:16px; }
    .lp-cal { background:rgba(255,255,255,.15); backdrop-filter:blur(12px); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2); border-radius:16px; padding:12px 16px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; color:#fff; }
    .lp-cal-day { text-align:center; flex:1; }
    .lp-cal-day .dl { font-size:10px; opacity:.7; text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:500; margin-bottom:4px; }
    .lp-cal-day .dn { font-size:13px; font-weight:600; }
    .lp-cal-day.act { background:rgba(255,255,255,.25); border-radius:10px; padding:2px 0; }
    .lp-summary { background:#fff; border-radius:16px; padding:16px; max-width:240px; }
    .lp-summary h4 { font-size:13px; font-weight:700; color:var(--charcoal); margin-bottom:2px; }
    .lp-summary p { font-size:11px; color:#7A7A77; font-weight:500; margin-bottom:10px; }
    .lp-avatars { display:flex; align-items:center; }
    .lp-av { width:22px; height:22px; border-radius:50%; border:1.5px solid #fff; background-size:cover; margin-right:-6px; }
    .login-error { color:var(--red); font-size:12px; margin-top:10px; display:none; background:var(--red-light); padding:8px 12px; border-radius:var(--radius); text-align:center; }
    .recovery-result { background:var(--gold-light); border:1px solid var(--gold); border-radius:var(--radius); padding:12px; margin-top:12px; font-size:12px; text-align:left; }
    @media(max-width:900px) {
    .lp-window { height:auto; flex-direction:column; border-radius:0; min-height:100vh; }
    .lp-media { display:none; }
    .lp-form-panel { padding:40px 30px; }
    }
    /* ── APP SHELL ── */
    #app { display:none; height:100vh; }
    .app-layout { display:flex; height:100vh; overflow:hidden; }
    /* ── SIDEBAR ── */
    .sidebar {
    width:var(--sidebar-w);
    background:var(--charcoal-2);
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    align-items:center;
    padding:14px 0;
    gap:4px;
    flex-shrink:0;
    z-index:40;
    }
    .sidebar-logo {
    width:36px; height:36px;
    background:var(--gold);
    border-radius:10px;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    font-weight:700; font-size:13px; color:var(--charcoal-2);
    margin-bottom:14px;
    letter-spacing:.04em;
    }
    .nav-item {
    width:44px; height:44px;
    border-radius:12px;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    cursor:pointer;
    transition:all .18s;
    position:relative;
    }
    .nav-item i { font-size:20px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.35); transition:color .18s; }
    .nav-item:hover { background:rgba(255,255,255,.08); }
    .nav-item:hover i { color:rgba(255,255,255,.75); }
    .nav-item.active { background:var(--gold); }
    .nav-item.active i { color:var(--charcoal-2); }
    .nav-item[title]:hover::after {
    content:attr(title);
    position:absolute;
    left:calc(100% + 10px);
    top:50%;
    transform:translateY(-50%);
    background:var(--charcoal);
    color:#fff;
    font-size:11px;
    font-weight:600;
    padding:5px 10px;
    border-radius:8px;
    white-space:nowrap;
    pointer-events:none;
    z-index:100;
    }
    .nav-spacer { flex:1; }
    /* ── MAIN AREA ── */
    .main-area { flex:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; overflow:hidden; }
    /* ── TOPBAR ── */
    .topbar {
    height:56px;
    background:var(--surface-2);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    display:flex; align-items:center;
    padding:0 20px; gap:12px;
    flex-shrink:0;
    }
    .topbar-title { font-size:15px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text); letter-spacing:-.01em; flex:1; }
    .topbar-search { flex:1; max-width:280px; position:relative; }
    .topbar-search input { width:100%; height:34px; background:#F4F2EC; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:20px; padding:0 14px 0 34px; font-size:12px; color:var(--text); outline:none; font-family:inherit; transition:all .2s; }
    .topbar-search input:focus { border-color:var(--gold-dark); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(245,196,83,.12); background:#fff; }
    .topbar-search i { position:absolute; left:11px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); font-size:15px; color:var(--text-3); pointer-events:none; }
    .save-status { font-size:11px; color:var(--text-3); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:5px; }
    .save-status.saved i { color:var(--green); }
    .save-status.saving i { color:var(--gold-dark); animation:spin .7s linear infinite; }
    .user-chip { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; background:#F4F2EC; border-radius:20px; padding:5px 12px 5px 6px; }
    .user-avatar { width:26px; height:26px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--gold); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:var(--charcoal-2); }
    .user-name { font-size:12px; font-weight:600; color:var(--text); }
    .logout-btn { font-size:12px; padding:6px 13px; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius-pill); background:transparent; color:var(--text-2); cursor:pointer; font-family:inherit; font-weight:500; transition:all .2s; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:5px; }
    .logout-btn i { font-size:14px; }
    .logout-btn:hover { background:var(--red-light); color:var(--red); border-color:#EFA3A3; }
    /* ── CONTENT ── */
    .content-area { flex:1; overflow-y:auto; padding:20px 22px; }
    .content-area::-webkit-scrollbar { width:5px; }
    .content-area::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:var(--border-2); border-radius:4px; }
    /* ── SECTION HEADER ── */
    .section-eyebrow { font-size:10px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text-3); letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:12px; }
    /* ── PIPELINE CARDS ── */
    .pipeline-cards { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:12px; margin-bottom:20px; }
    .p-card { border-radius:var(--radius-lg); padding:18px 16px; cursor:pointer; transition:transform .18s, box-shadow .18s; position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
    .p-card:hover { transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:var(--shadow); }
    .p-card-label { font-size:10px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.07em; text-transform:uppercase; opacity:.6; margin-bottom:10px; }
    .p-card-count { font-size:30px; font-weight:700; line-height:1; margin-bottom:4px; }
    .p-card-sub { font-size:11px; opacity:.65; font-weight:500; }
    .p-card-icon { position:absolute; bottom:-8px; right:-4px; font-size:52px; opacity:.12; }
    .card-gold { background:var(--gold); color:var(--charcoal-2); }
    .card-dark { background:var(--charcoal); color:#fff; }
    .card-slate { background:#3D3B52; color:#fff; }
    .card-amber { background:var(--gold-dark); color:#fff; }
    /* ── LAYOUT SPLITS ── */
    .split-65-35 { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 320px; gap:14px; }
    .right-col { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:14px; }
    /* ── PANEL ── */
    .panel { background:var(--surface-2); border-radius:var(--radius-lg); border:1px solid var(--border); overflow:hidden; }
    .panel-header { padding:12px 16px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; }
    .panel-title { font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text); letter-spacing:.01em; }
    .panel-actions { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
    /* ── PILL TABS ── */
    .pill-tabs { display:flex; gap:4px; }
    .pill-tab { padding:5px 11px; border-radius:20px; font-size:11px; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; border:none; background:transparent; color:var(--text-3); font-family:inherit; transition:all .15s; }
    .pill-tab.active { background:var(--gold); color:var(--charcoal-2); }
    .pill-tab:hover:not(.active) { background:var(--gray-light); color:var(--text); }
    /* ── TOOLBAR BTNS ── */
    .btn { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:5px; padding:7px 13px; font-size:11px; font-weight:600; font-family:inherit; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius-pill); background:var(--surface-2); color:var(--text); cursor:pointer; white-space:nowrap; transition:all .18s; }
    .btn i { font-size:14px; }
    .btn:hover { background:var(--surface); border-color:var(--border-2); }
    .btn.primary { background:var(--gold); color:var(--charcoal-2); border-color:var(--gold-dark); }
    .btn.primary:hover { background:var(--gold-dark); color:#fff; transform:translateY(-1px); }
    .btn.export { background:var(--blue-light); color:var(--blue); border-color:#b8d4f5; }
    .btn.export:hover { background:#d0e5f9; }
    /* ── SEARCH IN TOOLBAR ── */
    .search-wrap { position:relative; }
    .search-wrap input { height:32px; background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:20px; padding:0 12px 0 30px; font-size:12px; font-family:inherit; color:var(--text); outline:none; transition:all .2s; min-width:180px; }
    .search-wrap input:focus { border-color:var(--gold-dark); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(245,196,83,.1); background:#fff; }
    .search-wrap i { position:absolute; left:10px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); font-size:14px; color:var(--text-3); pointer-events:none; }
    .toolbar-select { height:32px; padding:0 10px; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:20px; font-size:11px; font-family:inherit; color:var(--text); background:var(--surface); cursor:pointer; font-weight:500; outline:none; }
    .toolbar-select:focus { border-color:var(--gold-dark); }
    /* ── TABLE ── */
    .table-scroll { overflow-x:auto; }
    table { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:12px; }
    th { padding:10px 14px; text-align:left; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; color:var(--text-3); background:var(--surface); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); white-space:nowrap; }
    td { padding:11px 14px; border-bottom:1px solid #F2F0EB; color:var(--text); white-space:nowrap; max-width:180px; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; }
    tr:last-child td { border-bottom:none; }
    tbody tr { cursor:pointer; transition:background .12s; }
    tbody tr td:first-child { border-left:2px solid transparent; transition:border-color .12s; }
    tbody tr:hover td { background:var(--gold-lighter); }
    tbody tr:hover td:first-child { border-left-color:var(--gold); }
    .name-cell { font-weight:600; font-size:12px; }
    .pp-cell { font-size:11px; color:var(--text-3); font-family:monospace; margin-top:1px; }
    .balance-owed { color:var(--amber); font-weight:700; }
    /* ── CLICK HINT ── */
    .click-hint { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:5px; font-size:10px; color:var(--text-3); padding:7px 14px; border-top:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--surface); }
    .click-hint i { font-size:13px; }
    /* ── BADGES ── */
    .badge { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; padding:3px 9px; border-radius:20px; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; white-space:nowrap; letter-spacing:.02em; }
    .b-pol { background:var(--blue-light); color:#0C447C; }
    .b-mol { background:var(--amber-light); color:#854F0B; }
    .b-visa { background:var(--pink-light); color:#72243E; }
    .b-travel { background:var(--purple-light); color:#3C3489; }
    .b-travelled { background:var(--green-light); color:#085041; }
    .b-complete { background:var(--green-light); color:#085041; }
    .b-incomplete{ background:var(--amber-light); color:#854F0B; }
    .b-returned { background:var(--red-light); color:#791F1F; }
    .b-na { background:var(--gray-light); color:#444441; }
    .b-notyet { background:var(--blue-light); color:#0C447C; }
    .b-nottravelled { background:var(--red-light); color:#791F1F; }
    /* ── ACTION BTNS ── */
    .action-btn { background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; color:var(--text-3); padding:4px 6px; border-radius:var(--radius); font-size:14px; line-height:1; transition:all .15s; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; }
    .action-btn:hover { color:var(--text); background:var(--gray-light); }
    .action-btn.del:hover { color:var(--red); background:var(--red-light); }
    .action-btn.docs { color:var(--blue); }
    .action-btn.docs:hover { background:var(--blue-light); }
    /* ── PAGINATION ── */
    .pagination { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:10px 16px; border-top:1px solid var(--border); font-size:11px; color:var(--text-3); background:var(--surface); }
    .page-btns { display:flex; gap:4px; }
    .page-btn { width:28px; height:28px; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--surface-2); font-size:11px; font-weight:600; color:var(--text-2); cursor:pointer; font-family:inherit; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; transition:all .15s; }
    .page-btn.active { background:var(--gold); border-color:var(--gold-dark); color:var(--charcoal-2); }
    .page-btn:hover:not(.active) { background:var(--surface); border-color:var(--border-2); }
    /* ── EMPTY ── */
    .empty { text-align:center; padding:3rem; color:var(--text-3); font-size:13px; font-weight:500; }
    /* ── RIGHT PANEL WIDGETS ── */
    .spotlight { background:var(--charcoal); border-radius:var(--radius-lg); padding:18px; color:#fff; }
    .spotlight-label { font-size:10px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(255,255,255,.4); margin-bottom:10px; }
    .spotlight-amount { font-size:26px; font-weight:700; color:var(--gold); line-height:1; margin-bottom:3px; }
    .spotlight-sub { font-size:11px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.45); margin-bottom:14px; }
    .spotlight-row { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:7px 0; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); }
    .spotlight-row:last-child { border-bottom:none; }
    .spotlight-row-label { font-size:11px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.5); font-weight:500; }
    .spotlight-row-val { font-size:11px; font-weight:700; }
    .due-panel { background:var(--gold-light); border-radius:var(--radius-lg); border:1px solid #F0E8C8; overflow:hidden; }
    .due-header { padding:11px 14px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:7px; border-bottom:1px solid #F0E8C8; }
    .due-header i { font-size:15px; color:var(--gold-dark); }
    .due-header span { font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text); }
    .due-item { padding:9px 14px; border-bottom:1px solid #F0E8C8; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; }
    .due-item:last-child { border-bottom:none; }
    .due-name { font-size:11px; font-weight:600; color:var(--text); }
    .due-stage { font-size:10px; color:var(--text-3); margin-top:1px; }
    .due-date { font-size:10px; font-weight:700; color:var(--gold-deeper); background:#F0E0A0; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:8px; }
    .due-empty { padding:12px 14px; font-size:11px; color:var(--text-3); text-align:center; }
    .activity-panel { background:var(--surface-2); border-radius:var(--radius-lg); border:1px solid var(--border); overflow:hidden; }
    .activity-header { padding:11px 14px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text); }
    .tl-item { display:flex; gap:10px; padding:9px 14px; border-bottom:1px solid #F2F0EB; }
    .tl-item:last-child { border-bottom:none; }
    .tl-dot { width:7px; height:7px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--gold); flex-shrink:0; margin-top:4px; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(245,196,83,.2); }
    .tl-action { font-size:11px; font-weight:600; color:var(--text); line-height:1.3; }
    .tl-meta { font-size:10px; color:var(--text-3); margin-top:2px; }
    .tl-empty { padding:14px; font-size:11px; color:var(--text-3); text-align:center; }
    /* ── DASHBOARD STAGE BARS ── */
    .dash-card { background:var(--surface-2); border-radius:var(--radius-lg); border:1px solid var(--border); padding:16px; }
    .dash-card h3 { font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text-3); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; margin-bottom:14px; }
    .dash-row { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:8px 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); }
    .dash-row:last-child { border-bottom:none; }
    .dash-row-label { font-size:12px; color:var(--text-2); font-weight:500; }
    .dash-row-val { font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text); }
    .dash-bar-wrap { height:4px; background:var(--gold-light); border-radius:3px; margin-top:4px; width:100%; }
    .dash-bar-fill { height:4px; background:var(--gold); border-radius:3px; }
    .dash-2col { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:14px; }
    /* ── METRICS STRIP ── */
    .metrics-strip { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(130px,1fr)); gap:10px; margin-bottom:18px; }
    .metric-card { background:var(--surface-2); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius-lg); padding:14px 16px; }
    .metric-label { font-size:10px; color:var(--text-3); margin-bottom:6px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; font-weight:600; }
    .metric-val { font-size:24px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text); }
    .metric-val.green { color:var(--green); }
    .metric-val.amber { color:var(--amber); }
    .metric-val.red { color:var(--red); }
    .metric-val.blue { color:var(--blue); }
    .metric-val.sm { font-size:16px; }
    /* ── MODAL ── */
    .modal-bg { display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(42,42,40,.5); backdrop-filter:blur(4px); z-index:200; align-items:flex-start; justify-content:center; padding:2rem 1rem; overflow-y:auto; }
    .modal-bg.open { display:flex; }
    .modal { background:var(--surface-2); border-radius:var(--radius-lg); border:1px solid var(--border); padding:0; width:100%; max-width:560px; margin:auto; box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg); overflow:hidden; }
    .modal-header { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:16px 20px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); }
    .modal-header h3 { font-size:15px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text); }
    .modal-close { background:var(--gray-light); border:none; cursor:pointer; color:var(--text-2); font-size:18px; line-height:1; padding:4px 9px; border-radius:var(--radius); transition:all .15s; }
    .modal-close:hover { background:var(--red-light); color:var(--red); }
    .modal-tabs { display:flex; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); padding:0 20px; }
    .modal-tab { padding:10px 14px; font-size:12px; font-weight:600; font-family:inherit; border:none; background:transparent; color:var(--text-3); cursor:pointer; border-bottom:2px solid transparent; transition:all .15s; }
    .modal-tab.active { color:var(--gold-deeper); border-bottom-color:var(--gold); }
    .modal-body { padding:20px; }
    .form-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:12px 16px; }
    .form-full { grid-column:1/-1; }
    .field { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:5px; }
    .field label { font-size:10px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text-3); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.05em; }
    .field input, .field select, .field textarea { padding:9px 12px; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius); font-size:13px; font-family:inherit; color:var(--text); background:var(--surface); transition:all .2s; font-weight:500; }
    .field input:focus, .field select:focus, .field textarea:focus { outline:none; border-color:var(--gold-dark); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(245,196,83,.12); }
    .field textarea { resize:vertical; min-height:60px; }
    .section-divider { font-size:10px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text-3); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.06em; padding:10px 0 4px; border-top:1px solid var(--border); margin-top:4px; grid-column:1/-1; }
    .modal-footer { display:flex; gap:8px; justify-content:flex-end; padding:14px 20px; border-top:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--surface); }
    /* ── DOCS MODAL ── */
    .doc-link-input { width:100%; padding:9px 12px; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius); font-size:13px; font-family:inherit; color:var(--text); background:var(--surface); font-weight:500; }
    .doc-link-input:focus { outline:none; border-color:var(--gold-dark); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(245,196,83,.12); }
    .doc-open-btn { padding:9px 14px; background:var(--blue-light); color:var(--blue); border:1px solid #b8d4f5; border-radius:var(--radius-pill); font-size:12px; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; font-family:inherit; transition:all .2s; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:5px; }
    .doc-open-btn:hover { background:#d0e5f9; }
    .doc-open-btn:disabled { opacity:.4; cursor:default; }
    /* ── TIMELINE IN MODAL ── */
    .tl-item-modal { display:flex; gap:12px; padding:10px 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); font-size:12px; }
    .tl-item-modal:last-child { border-bottom:none; }
    .tl-dot-modal { width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--gold); flex-shrink:0; margin-top:4px; }
    .tl-action-modal { font-weight:600; color:var(--text); }
    .tl-meta-modal { font-size:11px; color:var(--text-3); margin-top:2px; }
    /* ── TOAST ── */
    .toast { position:fixed; bottom:24px; right:24px; background:var(--charcoal); color:#fff; padding:10px 18px; border-radius:var(--radius-pill); font-size:12px; font-weight:600; z-index:999; opacity:0; transform:translateY(8px); transition:all .25s; pointer-events:none; box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:7px; }
    .toast i { font-size:14px; }
    .toast.show { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
    .toast.success i { color:var(--green); }
    .toast.error { background:var(--red); }
    .toast.error i { color:#fff; }
    /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
    @media(max-width:1024px) {
    .split-65-35 { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .right-col { display:none; }
    }
    @media(max-width:768px) {
    .pipeline-cards { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); }
    .form-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .dash-2col { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .content-area { padding:14px; }
    .sidebar { width:52px; }
    .nav-item { width:38px; height:38px; }
    }
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <!-- LOADING -->
    <div class="loading-overlay" id="loading-overlay">
    <div class="spinner"></div>
    <span id="loading-text">Loading…</span>
    </div>
    <!-- LOGIN -->
    <div id="login-screen">
    <div class="lp-window">
    <div class="lp-form-panel">
    <div class="lp-brand-tag">Destiny Recruit Consults</div>
    <div class="lp-content-area">
    <div id="login-main">
    <div class="lp-header">
    <h1>Sign in to Portal</h1>
    <p>Access active candidate pipelines</p>
    </div>
    <form onsubmit="event.preventDefault(); doLogin();">
    <div class="lp-input-group">
    <label for="username-input">Username</label>
    <div class="lp-input-wrap">
    <input type="text" id="username-input" placeholder="e.g. fred" required autocomplete="username">
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="lp-input-group">
    <label for="pw-input">Password</label>
    <div class="lp-input-wrap">
    <input type="password" id="pw-input" placeholder="••••••••••••" required autocomplete="current-password">
    <button class="lp-pw-toggle" type="button" id="pw-toggle" onclick="togglePassword()"><i class="ti ti-eye"></i></button>
    </div>
    <span class="lp-forgot" onclick="showForgotPassword()">Forgot Password?</span>
    </div>
    <button type="submit" class="lp-submit">Sign In</button>
    </form>
    <div class="login-error" id="login-error">Incorrect username or password.</div>
    <div class="lp-chips">
    <div class="lp-chip"><i class="ti ti-building"></i> Office LAN</div>
    <div class="lp-chip"><i class="ti ti-lock"></i> Secure SSL</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="forgot-section" style="display:none">
    <div class="lp-header">
    <h1>Credentials Reset</h1>
    <p>Enter the administrative recovery code</p>
    </div>
    <form onsubmit="event.preventDefault(); submitForgotPassword();">
    <div class="lp-input-group">
    <label for="recovery-code-input">Recovery Code</label>
    <div class="lp-input-wrap">
    <input type="text" id="recovery-code-input" placeholder="DR-RESET-2025" required>
    </div>
    </div>
    <button type="submit" class="lp-submit">Verify</button>
    </form>
    <div class="login-error" id="forgot-error" style="display:none"></div>
    <div class="recovery-result" id="forgot-result" style="display:none"></div>
    <span class="lp-forgot" style="text-align:center;margin-top:16px;display:block" onclick="hideForgotPassword()">← Back to login</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="lp-footer">
    <span>v3.4.1</span>
    <a href="https://supabase.com" target="_blank">Cloud Database Status</a>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="lp-media">
    <div class="lp-media-overlay"></div>
    <div class="lp-widget-task">
    <h4>Professional Job Review</h4>
    <p>Deployment Schedule: 09:30am</p>
    </div>
    <div class="lp-bottom">
    <div class="lp-cal">
    <div class="lp-cal-day"><div class="dl">Sun</div><div class="dn">22</div></div>
    <div class="lp-cal-day"><div class="dl">Mon</div><div class="dn">23</div></div>
    <div class="lp-cal-day act"><div class="dl">Tue</div><div class="dn">24</div></div>
    <div class="lp-cal-day"><div class="dl">Wed</div><div class="dn">25</div></div>
    <div class="lp-cal-day"><div class="dl">Thu</div><div class="dn">26</div></div>
    <div class="lp-cal-day"><div class="dl">Fri</div><div class="dn">27</div></div>
    <div class="lp-cal-day"><div class="dl">Sat</div><div class="dn">28</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="lp-summary">
    <h4>LB Candidate Processing</h4>
    <p>Passports Tracked: 98 Active</p>
    <div class="lp-avatars">
    <div class="lp-av" style="background-image:url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1580489944761-15a19d654956?auto=format&fit=crop&w=100&q=80')"></div>
    <div class="lp-av" style="background-image:url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1438761681033-6461ffad8d80?auto=format&fit=crop&w=100&q=80')"></div>
    <div class="lp-av" style="background-image:url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1492562080023-ab3db95bfbce?auto=format&fit=crop&w=100&q=80')"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- APP -->
    <div id="app">
    <div class="app-layout">
    <!-- SIDEBAR -->
    <aside class="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-logo">DR</div>
    <div class="nav-item active" id="nav-dash" title="Dashboard" onclick="switchTab('dash')"><i class="ti ti-layout-dashboard"></i></div>
    <div class="nav-item" id="nav-pro" title="Professional" onclick="switchTab('pro')"><i class="ti ti-briefcase"></i></div>
    <div class="nav-item" id="nav-lb" title="LB Jobs" onclick="switchTab('lb')"><i class="ti ti-home"></i></div>
    <div class="nav-spacer"></div>
    <div class="nav-item" id="nav-logout" title="Sign out" onclick="doLogout()" style="margin-bottom:4px"><i class="ti ti-logout"></i></div>
    </aside>
    <!-- MAIN -->
    <div class="main-area">
    <!-- TOPBAR -->
    <div class="topbar">
    <span class="topbar-title" id="topbar-title">Dashboard</span>
    <div class="topbar-search">
    <i class="ti ti-search"></i>
    <input type="text" placeholder="Search candidates…" id="global-search" oninput="onGlobalSearch()">
    </div>
    <div class="save-status saved" id="save-status">
    <i class="ti ti-circle-check"></i>
    <span id="save-text">Saved</span>
    </div>
    <div class="user-chip">
    <div class="user-avatar" id="user-avatar-initials">—</div>
    <span class="user-name" id="user-chip">—</span>
    </div>
    <button class="logout-btn" onclick="doLogout()"><i class="ti ti-logout"></i> Sign out</button>
    </div>
    <!-- CONTENT -->
    <div class="content-area">
    <!-- ── DASHBOARD ── -->
    <div id="dash-section">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">Pipeline overview</div>
    <div class="pipeline-cards" id="dash-pipeline-cards">
    <!-- filled by renderDash() -->
    </div>
    <div class="split-65-35">
    <div>
    <div class="dash-2col" id="dash-cards-grid">
    <!-- filled by renderDash() -->
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="right-col" id="dash-right-col">
    <!-- filled by renderDash() -->
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ── PROFESSIONAL ── -->
    <div id="pro-section" style="display:none">
    <div class="metrics-strip" id="pro-metrics"></div>
    <div class="panel">
    <div class="panel-header">
    <span class="panel-title">Professional candidates</span>
    <div class="panel-actions">
    <div class="pill-tabs" id="pro-stage-pills">
    <button class="pill-tab active" onclick="setProStagePill('',this)">All</button>
    </div>
    <div class="search-wrap">
    <i class="ti ti-search"></i>
    <input type="text" id="pro-search" placeholder="Search…" oninput="renderPro()">
    </div>
    <select class="toolbar-select" id="pro-company-f" onchange="renderPro()"><option value="">All companies</option></select>
    <button class="btn export" onclick="exportCSV('pro')"><i class="ti ti-download"></i> Export</button>
    <button class="btn" onclick="addCustomStage('pro')"><i class="ti ti-settings"></i></button>
    <button class="btn primary" onclick="openProForm()"><i class="ti ti-plus"></i> Add candidate</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="table-scroll">
    <table>
    <thead><tr>
    <th>#</th><th>Full name</th><th>Position</th><th>Company</th><th>Country</th><th>Stage</th>
    <th>Commission</th><th>Paid</th><th>Balance</th><th>Docs</th><th></th>
    </tr></thead>
    <tbody id="pro-tbody"><tr><td colspan="11"><div class="empty">Loading…</div></td></tr></tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
    <div class="click-hint"><i class="ti ti-hand-click"></i> Click any row to edit that candidate</div>
    <div class="pagination" id="pro-pagination"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ── LB JOBS ── -->
    <div id="lb-section" style="display:none">
    <div class="metrics-strip" id="lb-metrics"></div>
    <div class="panel">
    <div class="panel-header">
    <span class="panel-title">LB candidates</span>
    <div class="panel-actions">
    <div class="pill-tabs" id="lb-travel-pills">
    <button class="pill-tab active" onclick="setLBTravelPill('',this)">All</button>
    <button class="pill-tab" onclick="setLBTravelPill('TRAVELLED',this)">Travelled</button>
    <button class="pill-tab" onclick="setLBTravelPill('NOT YET',this)">Not yet</button>
    <button class="pill-tab" onclick="setLBTravelPill('NOT TRAVELLED',this)">Did not travel</button>
    </div>
    <div class="search-wrap">
    <i class="ti ti-search"></i>
    <input type="text" id="lb-search" placeholder="Search…" oninput="renderLB()">
    </div>
    <select class="toolbar-select" id="lb-refund-f" onchange="renderLB()">
    <option value="">All refund statuses</option>
    <option value="complete">Complete</option>
    <option value="incomplete">Incomplete</option>
    <option value="RETURNED">Returned</option>
    <option value="N/A">N/A (HAD PP)</option>
    </select>
    <button class="btn export" onclick="exportCSV('lb')"><i class="ti ti-download"></i> Export</button>
    <button class="btn" onclick="addCustomStage('lb')"><i class="ti ti-settings"></i></button>
    <button class="btn primary" onclick="openLBForm()"><i class="ti ti-plus"></i> Add candidate</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="table-scroll">
    <table>
    <thead><tr>
    <th>#</th><th>Full name</th><th>Phone</th><th>Passport</th>
    <th>Travel status</th><th>Travel date</th><th>To refund</th>
    <th>Refunded</th><th>Balance</th><th>Refund status</th><th>Docs</th><th></th>
    </tr></thead>
    <tbody id="lb-tbody"><tr><td colspan="12"><div class="empty">Loading…</div></td></tr></tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
    <div class="click-hint"><i class="ti ti-hand-click"></i> Click any row to edit that candidate</div>
    <div class="pagination" id="lb-pagination"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div><!-- /content-area -->
    </div><!-- /main-area -->
    </div><!-- /app-layout -->
    </div><!-- /app -->
    <!-- PRO MODAL -->
    <div class="modal-bg" id="pro-modal">
    <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-header">
    <h3 id="pro-modal-title">Add professional candidate</h3>
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('pro-modal')">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-tabs">
    <button class="modal-tab active" onclick="switchModalTab('pro','details',this)">Details</button>
    <button class="modal-tab" onclick="switchModalTab('pro','pipeline',this)">Pipeline</button>
    <button class="modal-tab" onclick="switchModalTab('pro','commission',this)">Commission</button>
    <button class="modal-tab" onclick="switchModalTab('pro','timeline',this)">Timeline</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
    <div id="pro-tab-details">
    <div class="form-grid">
    <div class="field form-full"><label>Full name *</label><input type="text" id="pf-name" placeholder="e.g. John Kamau Mwangi"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Passport no.</label><input type="text" id="pf-pp" placeholder="e.g. BK1234567"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Phone number</label><input type="text" id="pf-phone" placeholder="e.g. 0712345678"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Position</label><input type="text" id="pf-position" placeholder="e.g. Security Guard"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Company</label><input type="text" id="pf-company" placeholder="e.g. HPBS"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Destination country</label><input type="text" id="pf-country" placeholder="e.g. UAE"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Current stage *</label><select id="pf-stage" onchange="handleStageSelectChange('pro',this)"></select></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Date submitted</label><input type="date" id="pf-submitted"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="pro-tab-pipeline" style="display:none">
    <div class="form-grid">
    <div class="field"><label>Interview / selection date</label><input type="date" id="pf-interview"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Offer letter date</label><input type="date" id="pf-ol"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>MOL date</label><input type="date" id="pf-mol"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Visa date</label><input type="date" id="pf-visa"></div>
    <div class="field form-full"><label>Travel date</label><input type="date" id="pf-travel"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="pro-tab-commission" style="display:none">
    <div class="form-grid">
    <div class="field"><label>Commission (KES)</label><input type="number" id="pf-comm" placeholder="e.g. 130000"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Amount paid (KES)</label><input type="number" id="pf-paid" placeholder="e.g. 120000"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="pro-tab-timeline" style="display:none">
    <div id="pro-form-timeline"><div class="tl-empty">Save the candidate first to see timeline.</div></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
    <button class="btn" onclick="closeModal('pro-modal')">Cancel</button>
    <button class="btn primary" onclick="savePro()"><i class="ti ti-device-floppy"></i> Save candidate</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- LB MODAL -->
    <div class="modal-bg" id="lb-modal">
    <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-header">
    <h3 id="lb-modal-title">Add LB candidate</h3>
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('lb-modal')">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-tabs">
    <button class="modal-tab active" onclick="switchModalTab('lb','details',this)">Details</button>
    <button class="modal-tab" onclick="switchModalTab('lb','refunds',this)">Refunds</button>
    <button class="modal-tab" onclick="switchModalTab('lb','timeline',this)">Timeline</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
    <div id="lb-tab-details">
    <div class="form-grid">
    <div class="field form-full"><label>Full name *</label><input type="text" id="lf-name" placeholder="e.g. Mary Wanjiku Kamau"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Phone number</label><input type="text" id="lf-phone" placeholder="e.g. 0712345678"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Passport status *</label>
    <select id="lf-pp">
    <option value="APPLIED">Applied</option>
    <option value="HAD PP">Had PP</option>
    <option value="NOT APPLIED">Not applied</option>
    <option value="PUSHED">Pushed</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    <div class="field"><label>Travel status</label><select id="lf-travel" onchange="handleStageSelectChange('lb',this)"></select></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Travel date</label><input type="date" id="lf-tdate"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Notes</label><input type="text" id="lf-notes" placeholder="Write RETURNED if applicable"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="lb-tab-refunds" style="display:none">
    <div class="form-grid">
    <div class="field form-full"><label>Amount to refund (USD)</label><input type="number" id="lf-torefund" placeholder="e.g. 200"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>1st payment date</label><input type="date" id="lf-r1date"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>1st amount (USD)</label><input type="number" id="lf-r1amt" placeholder="e.g. 100"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>2nd payment date</label><input type="date" id="lf-r2date"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>2nd amount (USD)</label><input type="number" id="lf-r2amt" placeholder="e.g. 100"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="lb-tab-timeline" style="display:none">
    <div id="lb-form-timeline"><div class="tl-empty">Save the candidate first to see timeline.</div></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
    <button class="btn" onclick="closeModal('lb-modal')">Cancel</button>
    <button class="btn primary" onclick="saveLB()"><i class="ti ti-device-floppy"></i> Save candidate</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- DOCS MODAL -->
    <div class="modal-bg" id="docs-modal">
    <div class="modal" style="max-width:460px">
    <div class="modal-header">
    <h3 id="docs-modal-title">Documents</h3>
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('docs-modal')">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
    <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-3);margin-bottom:14px">
    Upload all of this candidate's documents (passport, ID, offer letter, MOL, visa, etc.) into one Google Drive folder, then paste the share link below.
    <a href="https://support.google.com/drive/answer/2494822" target="_blank" style="color:var(--blue)">How to get a share link →</a>
    </p>
    <div class="field">
    <label>Documents folder link</label>
    <input class="doc-link-input" type="text" id="docs-link-input" placeholder="Paste Google Drive folder link…" oninput="onDocsLinkInput()">
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer" style="justify-content:space-between">
    <button class="doc-open-btn" id="docs-open-btn" disabled onclick="openCurrentDocLink()"><i class="ti ti-folder-open"></i> View documents</button>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px">
    <button class="btn" onclick="closeModal('docs-modal')">Close</button>
    <button class="btn primary" onclick="saveDocs()"><i class="ti ti-device-floppy"></i> Save</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- TOAST -->
    <div class="toast" id="toast"><i class="ti ti-circle-check"></i><span id="toast-msg">Saved</span></div>
    <!-- Scripts -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
    <script src="data.js"></script>
    <script src="app.js"></script>
    <script>
    /* ── NEW UI HELPERS (extend app.js without modifying it) ── */
    /* Pill filter state */
    let proStagePillFilter = '';
    let lbTravelPillFilter = '';
    function setProStagePill(val, btn) {
    proStagePillFilter = val;
    document.querySelectorAll('#pro-stage-pills .pill-tab').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    // Also sync legacy select if present
    const sel = document.getElementById('pro-stage-f');
    if (sel) sel.value = val;
    renderPro();
    }
    function setLBTravelPill(val, btn) {
    lbTravelPillFilter = val;
    document.querySelectorAll('#lb-travel-pills .pill-tab').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    const sel = document.getElementById('lb-travel-f');
    if (sel) sel.value = val;
    renderLB();
    }
    /* Global search — routes to current tab */
    function onGlobalSearch() {
    const q = document.getElementById('global-search').value;
    const proS = document.getElementById('pro-search');
    const lbS = document.getElementById('lb-search');
    if (proS) proS.value = q;
    if (lbS) lbS.value = q;
    const active = document.querySelector('.nav-item.active');
    if (active && active.id === 'nav-pro') renderPro();
    else if (active && active.id === 'nav-lb') renderLB();
    }
    /* Clickable rows — wrap existing editPro / editLB */
    function proRowClick(id) { editPro(id); }
    function lbRowClick(id) { editLB(id); }
    /* Override switchTab to also update sidebar + topbar title */
    const _origSwitchTab = typeof switchTab === 'function' ? switchTab : null;
    function switchTab(t) {
    ['dash','pro','lb'].forEach(x => {
    const nav = document.getElementById('nav-'+x);
    if (nav) nav.classList.toggle('active', x === t);
    const sec = document.getElementById(x+'-section');
    if (sec) sec.style.display = x === t ? '' : 'none';
    });
    const titles = { dash:'Dashboard', pro:'Professional', lb:'LB Jobs' };
    const el = document.getElementById('topbar-title');
    if (el) el.textContent = titles[t] || 'Dashboard';
    if (t === 'dash') renderDash();
    if (t === 'pro') { rebuildProPills(); renderPro(); }
    if (t === 'lb') renderLB();
    }
    /* Rebuild pro stage pill tabs from proStages array */
    function rebuildProPills() {
    const wrap = document.getElementById('pro-stage-pills');
    if (!wrap) return;
    wrap.innerHTML = `<button class="pill-tab ${proStagePillFilter===''?'active':''}" onclick="setProStagePill('',this)">All</button>` +
    proStages.map(s => `<button class="pill-tab ${proStagePillFilter===s?'active':''}" onclick="setProStagePill('${s.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}',this)">${s.replace('PENDING ','')}</button>`).join('');
    }
    /* Override getFilteredPro to honour pill filter */
    const _origGetFilteredPro = typeof getFilteredPro === 'function' ? getFilteredPro : null;
    function getFilteredPro() {
    const q = (document.getElementById('pro-search').value || '').toLowerCase();
    const stage = proStagePillFilter || (document.getElementById('pro-stage-f') ? document.getElementById('pro-stage-f').value : '');
    const comp = document.getElementById('pro-company-f') ? document.getElementById('pro-company-f').value : '';
    return proDB.filter(r => {
    const text = `${r.name} ${r.pp||''} ${r.company||''} ${r.position||''}`.toLowerCase();
    return (!q || text.includes(q)) && (!stage || r.stage === stage) && (!comp || r.company === comp);
    });
    }
    /* Override getFilteredLB for pill */
    function getFilteredLB() {
    const q = (document.getElementById('lb-search').value || '').toLowerCase();
    const travel = lbTravelPillFilter || (document.getElementById('lb-travel-f') ? document.getElementById('lb-travel-f').value : '');
    const refund = document.getElementById('lb-refund-f') ? document.getElementById('lb-refund-f').value : '';
    return lbDB.filter(r => {
    const text = `${r.name} ${r.phone||''}`.toLowerCase();
    const ts = r.travelStatus || r.travel_status || '';
    const rs = getRefundStatus(r);
    return (!q || text.includes(q)) && (!travel || ts === travel) && (!refund || rs === refund);
    });
    }
    /* Override renderPro to inject row-click and name-cell formatting */
    const _origRenderPro = typeof renderPro === 'function' ? renderPro : null;
    function renderPro() {
    let totalComm = 0, totalPaid = 0;
    proDB.forEach(r => { if(r.commission) totalComm += Number(r.commission); if(r.paid) totalPaid += Number(r.paid); });
    const metricsEl = document.getElementById('pro-metrics');
    if (metricsEl) metricsEl.innerHTML = `
    <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-label">Total</div><div class="metric-val">${proDB.length}</div></div>
    <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-label">In process</div><div class="metric-val amber">${proDB.filter(isInProcessPro).length}</div></div>
    <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-label">Travelled</div><div class="metric-val green">${proDB.filter(r=>r.stage==='TRAVELLED').length}</div></div>
    <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-label">Commission billed</div><div class="metric-val sm">KES ${totalComm.toLocaleString()}</div></div>
    <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-label">Outstanding</div><div class="metric-val sm amber">KES ${(totalComm-totalPaid).toLocaleString()}</div></div>`;
    const companies = [...new Set(proDB.map(r => r.company).filter(Boolean))].sort();
    const csel = document.getElementById('pro-company-f');
    if (csel) {
    const ccur = csel.value;
    csel.innerHTML = '<option value="">All companies</option>' + companies.map(c => `<option value="${c}"${c===ccur?' selected':''}>${c}</option>`).join('');
    }
    const data = getFilteredPro();
    const totalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(data.length / PER_PAGE));
    if (proPage > totalPages) proPage = 1;
    const slice = data.slice((proPage-1)*PER_PAGE, proPage*PER_PAGE);
    const tbody = document.getElementById('pro-tbody');
    if (!tbody) return;
    if (!slice.length) {
    tbody.innerHTML = `<tr><td colspan="11"><div class="empty">No candidates found</div></td></tr>`;
    } else {
    tbody.innerHTML = slice.map((r,i) => {
    const comm = r.commission ? 'KES '+Number(r.commission).toLocaleString() : '—';
    const paid = r.paid ? 'KES '+Number(r.paid).toLocaleString() : '—';
    const bal = (r.commission && r.paid) ? Number(r.commission)-Number(r.paid) : null;
    const balTxt = bal !== null ? 'KES '+bal.toLocaleString() : '—';
    const hd = hasDocs('pro', r.id);
    return `<tr onclick="proRowClick(${r.id})">
    <td>${(proPage-1)*PER_PAGE+i+1}</td>
    <td><div class="name-cell">${r.name}</div><div class="pp-cell">${r.pp||''}</div></td>
    <td style="color:var(--text-2)">${r.position||'—'}</td>
    <td style="color:var(--text-2)">${r.company||'—'}</td>
    <td style="color:var(--text-2)">${r.country||'—'}</td>
    <td>${stageBadge(r.stage)}</td>
    <td>${comm}</td>
    <td>${paid}</td>
    <td class="${bal&&bal>0?'balance-owed':''}">${balTxt}</td>
    <td onclick="event.stopPropagation()"><button class="action-btn docs" onclick="openDocs('pro',${r.id},'${r.name.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}')" title="${hd?'View/edit documents':'Add documents'}"><i class="ti ti-paperclip"></i>${hd?' ✅':''}</button></td>
    <td onclick="event.stopPropagation()" style="white-space:nowrap">
    <button class="action-btn del" onclick="deletePro(${r.id})"><i class="ti ti-trash"></i></button>
    </td>
    </tr>`;
    }).join('');
    }
    renderPagination('pro-pagination', proPage, totalPages, data.length, 'pro');
    }
    /* Override renderLB to inject row-click */
    function renderLB() {
    let lbOwed = 0, lbPaid = 0;
    lbDB.forEach(r => {
    if ((r.travelStatus||r.travel_status) === 'TRAVELLED' &&
    (r.ppStatus||r.pp_status) !== 'HAD PP' &&
    (r.notes||'').trim().toUpperCase() !== 'RETURNED') {
    lbOwed += Number(r.toRefund||r.to_refund) || 0;
    lbPaid += (Number(r.r1Amt||r.r1_amt)||0) + (Number(r.r2Amt||r.r2_amt)||0);
    }
    });
    const metricsEl = document.getElementById('lb-metrics');
    if (metricsEl) metricsEl.innerHTML = `
    <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-label">Total</div><div class="metric-val">${lbDB.length}</div></div>
    <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-label">In process</div><div class="metric-val amber">${lbDB.filter(isInProcessLB).length}</div></div>
    <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-label">Travelled</div><div class="metric-val green">${lbDB.filter(r=>(r.travelStatus||r.travel_status)==='TRAVELLED').length}</div></div>
    <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-label">Refund balance</div><div class="metric-val sm amber">$${lbOwed-lbPaid}</div></div>
    <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-label">Incomplete</div><div class="metric-val red">${lbDB.filter(r=>getRefundStatus(r)==='incomplete').length}</div></div>`;
    const data = getFilteredLB();
    const totalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(data.length / PER_PAGE));
    if (lbPage > totalPages) lbPage = 1;
    const slice = data.slice((lbPage-1)*PER_PAGE, lbPage*PER_PAGE);
    const tbody = document.getElementById('lb-tbody');
    if (!tbody) return;
    if (!slice.length) {
    tbody.innerHTML = `<tr><td colspan="12"><div class="empty">No candidates found</div></td></tr>`;
    } else {
    tbody.innerHTML = slice.map((r,i) => {
    const rs = getRefundStatus(r);
    const ts = r.travelStatus || r.travel_status || '';
    const toR = Number(r.toRefund||r.to_refund) || 0;
    const paid = (Number(r.r1Amt||r.r1_amt)||0) + (Number(r.r2Amt||r.r2_amt)||0);
    const bal = (rs==='N/A'||rs==='RETURNED') ? '—' : '$'+(toR-paid);
    const td = r.travelDate || r.travel_date;
    const hd = hasDocs('lb', r.id);
    return `<tr onclick="lbRowClick(${r.id})">
    <td>${(lbPage-1)*PER_PAGE+i+1}</td>
    <td class="name-cell">${r.name}</td>
    <td>${r.phone||'—'}</td>
    <td>${r.ppStatus||r.pp_status||'—'}</td>
    <td>${travelBadge(ts)}</td>
    <td>${fmtDate(td)}</td>
    <td>${rs==='N/A'?'—':'$'+toR}</td>
    <td>${rs==='N/A'?'—':'$'+paid}</td>
    <td class="${rs==='incomplete'?'balance-owed':''}">${bal}</td>
    <td>${refundBadge(rs)}</td>
    <td onclick="event.stopPropagation()"><button class="action-btn docs" onclick="openDocs('lb',${r.id},'${r.name.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}')" title="${hd?'View/edit documents':'Add documents'}"><i class="ti ti-paperclip"></i>${hd?' ✅':''}</button></td>
    <td onclick="event.stopPropagation()" style="white-space:nowrap">
    <button class="action-btn del" onclick="deleteLB(${r.id})"><i class="ti ti-trash"></i></button>
    </td>
    </tr>`;
    }).join('');
    }
    renderPagination('lb-pagination', lbPage, totalPages, data.length, 'lb');
    }
    View remainder of file in raw view
